_comment: Captured Sarvam STT WS final-frame shape (May 2026). Used by voice-acceptance-stub.ts to verify the SarvamSttClient response parser without hitting the live Sarvam API. Update this fixture if Sarvam ever changes the response shape — the stub will fail and force a parser update.

data.transcript: Haan, mujhe interest hai. Kya aap demo schedule kar sakte hain?
